hero.title: Join Edusky
hero.subtitle: 2026 enrollment is open. Here is everything you need to know — clearly, honestly, with no hidden surprises.

process.title: Discover
process.description: WhatsApp, call, or fill the inquiry form. Tell us your child's age and what you need.

process.title: Visit
process.description: Tour the campus. Meet Dr. Sean. See classrooms, labs, and the small-class magic.

process.title: Trial Week
process.description: Your child joins real classes for a week. No commitment. Just experience.

process.title: Apply
process.description: Submit birth cert, IC, photos, previous reports. We send the full checklist.

process.title: Enrol
process.description: Sign the registration form. Pay the fee. Your child is officially an Edusky student.

process.title: Start
process.description: Uniform fitting, orientation day, first week check-in. We do not drop you after signup.

faq.question: What curriculum does Edusky follow?
faq.answer: We follow the KSSR (Kurikulum Standard Sekolah Rendah), Malaysia's national primary curriculum approved by the Ministry of Education. Our SMIPS registration code is JDA1001.

faq.question: What are the school hours?
faq.answer: School runs Mon–Thu 8:30 AM – 1:00 PM with Enrichment 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM, and Fri 8:30 AM – 12:00 PM.

faq.question: What is the maximum class size?
faq.answer: We maintain a maximum teacher-student ratio of approximately 1:15. This is core to our philosophy — every child is known individually, taught personally, and supported fully.

faq.question: Does Edusky accept children who need extra support?
faq.answer: Yes. We are an intentionally small school, which means teachers have the time and space to understand each child individually. Children who learn at a different pace often thrive here.

faq.question: What ages does Edusky accept?
faq.answer: Standard 1 through Standard 6, typically ages 7 to 12.

faq.question: Is there a trial period?
faq.answer: Yes. We offer a trial week — your child attends real classes before you make any long-term commitment.

faq.question: How do I pay fees?
faq.answer: Fees can be paid by bank transfer, cheque, or online banking. We issue official receipts for all payments.

faq.question: Is there after-school care?
faq.answer: Enrichment programmes and after-school tuition are available on-site for children who stay beyond regular hours.

open_days.description: Saturday morning tour. Meet teachers, see classrooms, ask questions. No appointment needed.
Enrolment clinic. Bring documents, get on-the-spot assessment, and secure a place for 2026.
Student-led campus tour. See the school through the eyes of current students.
